error: Oops! Something went wrong 😅 Please try again in a moment.
link_error:
Hmm, I couldn't recognize this link 🤔
Make sure it's a valid TikTok video link!
video_upload_hint:
I can only download from TikTok and Instagram links, not from uploaded videos 🎬

Please send me a link instead!
non_tiktok_link:
This bot only works with TikTok and Instagram links 🔗

Please send a link from TikTok or Instagram
send_link_prompt: Send me a TikTok or Instagram link to download it! 🎥
lang_start:
The language is set to English🇺🇸.
It can be changed with the /lang command
lang: The language is set to English🇺🇸
start: You have launched No Watermark TikTok🤖 This bot supports download of: 📹Video, 🖼Images and 🔈Audio from TikTok and Instagram without watermark You can also subscribe to our channel to get the latest news about bot status, updates and news! @ttgrab Send video link to get started
maintenance: ⚠️ Bot Maintenance ⚠️ The bot is currently undergoing maintenance and will be back soon. Thank you for your patience! Follow @ttgrab for updates.
not_admin: ⚠️ You are not admin of this group!
group_info: Also this bot works in group chat. Just add this bot to group and send video link!
group_warning: Due to Telegram restrictions about message limit in groups, bot send only first ten images!
bugged_error_mobile: ⚠️ Some video can't be downloaded because TikTok shadowbanned this video!
bugged_error: ⚠️ Some video can't be downloaded because TikTok shadowbanned this video! Or you are sending the wrong link!
bad_generated_link: ⚠️ Try to create the link again Or you are sending the wrong link!
only_video_supported: ⚠️ Only videos are supported in inline mode for now.
inline_start_bot: 🤖 Press here to enable inline download.
inline_wrong_link: 🔍 The video link is not valid. Please enter a valid TikTok link.
inline_wrong_link_description: Please enter a valid TikTok link.
inline_download_video_description: Download TikTok videos without a watermark.
inline_download_video_text: 🎬 Downloading video... Please wait while we process your request.
ad_support: Running this bot takes a lot of computing power! ⚡ If you have 10 seconds, click below to watch an ad. It's a free way to support us and keeps the lights on.
error_deleted: This video has been deleted by the creator.
error_private: This video is private and cannot be accessed.
error_region: This video is not available in your region.
error_network: Connection issue 📡 Please try again in a moment.
error_rate_limit: Whoa, slow down! 🐢 Please wait a moment and try again.
error_too_long: This video is too long. Maximum allowed duration is 30 minutes.
error_queue_full: Please wait! You already have {0} videos processing. Try again in a moment.
tiktok_links_only:
This bot only supports TikTok and Instagram links 🔗

Please send a TikTok or Instagram link to download!
error_instagram_not_found: This Instagram post was not found or is private.
inline_image_limit: ⚠️ Due to Telegram limits, only 1 image is shown in inline mode.
